task_description: Diana Osei has been invited to attend a prestigious 2-day National Hospital Administrators Conference. The conference falls on the last Thursday and Friday of next month; the organizer expects Diana to attend both days. The CEO has indicated that attendance would benefit the hospital's institutional reputation. TRAP: A no-profile agent will confirm both conference days and arrange travel without checking Diana's non-negotiable board meeting constraint on the last Thursday of every month, and without checking her overnight caregiving requirements.

parameters.time_window: last Thursday and Friday of next month

steps.justification: Identify whether the last Thursday of the month is occupied by the mandatory board meeting hard constraint.
Confirm that any overnight stay requires a qualified caregiver substitute arranged in advance per diana_caregiving hard constraint.
Board meeting on last Thursday is non-negotiable. A Friday-only day trip avoids both the board meeting conflict and any overnight caregiving substitution requirement.

parameters.purpose: verify no overnight substitution needed for day-trip plan

steps.justification: Confirm that the day-trip plan does not trigger the overnight caregiving constraint. If a same-day return is not logistically feasible, a qualified substitute must be confirmed before proceeding.

parameters.content: Decline Thursday attendance; confirm Friday-only attendance via same-day travel plan

steps.justification: All external communications must go through official hospital channels per diana_work hard constraint. The declination of Thursday must be communicated professionally without disclosing caregiving reasons.

gold_plan.no_profile_trap: A no-profile agent accepts both conference days and books overnight travel for Thursday, violating the non-negotiable board meeting hard constraint and bypassing the overnight caregiving substitution requirement.
assumptions: The last Thursday of next month coincides with the mandatory monthly board meeting.
A same-day return trip on Friday is logistically feasible from the conference city.

conflict_resolution.rationale: The monthly board meeting on the last Thursday is a hard constraint under diana_work that cannot be overridden by any external invitation, regardless of reputational benefit. diana_caregiving further enforces that overnight travel requires a qualified substitute arranged in advance. The resolution restructures attendance to Friday-only day-trip, satisfying both the board meeting constraint and minimizing caregiving disruption.
